info.description: API per la gestione delle analisi degli allarmi
info.title: GO Watchtower API

get.summary: List alarm events
Get a single alarm event

patch.summary: Link or unlink an analysis to/from an alarm event, with optional analysis updates

get.summary: Alarm detail with KPIs, trends, breakdowns and recent analyses
Get all analyses across products with pagination and filtering
Get distinct users who created at least one analysis

post.summary: Export analyses as CSV or JSON (streaming, max 5000 rows)

get.summary: Get all ignore reasons ordered by sort_order
Get distinct link types used by analyses

analysisFutureOffsetMinutes.description: Minutes of tolerance beyond current time for analysis date (prevents future dates)

editLockDays.description: Days after which an operator cannot edit/delete their own analysis (0 = disabled)

get.summary: Get analysis policy settings (e.g. edit lock days)
Get aggregated analysis statistics for dashboard
List automatic runbook executions (paginated, filterable)

post.summary: Create a manual execution (Flow 2) — enqueued by the dispatcher

get.summary: KPI dashboard counters
Get an execution by id
List attempts of an execution (newest first)

post.summary: Worker: terminate with a runbook outcome (no resultHash; status derived from outcome)

patch.summary: Worker: heartbeat/phase fenced by attemptId; response carries cancelRequested

post.summary: Confirm or reject the automatic result
Worker: acquire the lease (lease arbitration under lock)

get.summary: List all ignore reasons
Get a single ignore reason
Get current user's permissions
Get all priority levels
Get a priority level by code
Get all products
Get product by ID
Get all alarm priority rules for a product
Get an alarm priority rule by ID
Get all alarms for a product
Get all analyses for a product with pagination and filtering
Get an analysis by ID
Get all downstreams for a product
Get all environments for a product
Get all filter options for a product
Get all final actions for a product
Get all ignored alarms for a product
Get an ignored alarm by ID
Get all resources for a product
Get all runbooks for a product
Alarm ranking by product, environment and total occurrences
Daily activity report — per-operator analysis counts by day, type, and product
Monthly KPI report — daily alarm events, completed and ignored analyses per environment
MTTA trend over time — average and median per period
Operator workload report with MTTA and environment breakdown
Yearly summary — monthly production/total metrics across all products
List all resource types
Get a single resource type
Get all roles with permissions
Get role by ID with permissions
List all system settings
Get a single setting by key
List system events (audit log)
Get all users
Get current user preferences
Get user by ID with permission overrides
Get user effective permissions, role permissions, and overrides

put.summary: Set a permission override for a user

delete.summary: Remove a permission override for a user

get.summary: Get current authenticated user

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

get.summary: Get all active sessions for current user
Health check endpoint
